theorem nat_strong_induction (P : ℕ → Prop) (h0 : P 0)
    (h1 : ∀ n, (∀ m < n, P m) → P n) : ∀ n, P n := by
  intro n
  induction n using Nat.strongRecOn with
  | ind n ih => exact h1 n ih
  exact h0
